fields.title: Prime Land in Lekki Phase 1 - 500sqm
fields.description: A premium dry land in the heart of Lekki Phase 1. Fully fenced and gated. C of O available. Excellent for residential or commercial development. Very close to major amenities and arterial roads.
fields.meta_description: Prime 500sqm dry land for sale in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos. C of O available. Price: ₦85,000,000.

fields.title: Luxury 4-Bedroom Duplex in Victoria Island
fields.description: A stunning fully detached 4-bedroom duplex with a BQ in the prestigious Victoria Island. Features include: spacious living areas, fitted kitchen, en-suite bedrooms, 24/7 security, swimming pool, CCTV, and a boys' quarters.
fields.meta_description: Luxury 4-bedroom fully detached duplex for sale in Victoria Island, Lagos. ₦250,000,000.

fields.title: Modern 3-Bedroom Apartment in Ikoyi
fields.description: A beautifully finished 3-bedroom serviced apartment in the serene Ikoyi neighborhood. Comes with 24/7 electricity, water supply, security and dedicated parking. Perfect for executives and diplomats.
fields.meta_description: Modern 3-bedroom serviced apartment for sale in Ikoyi, Lagos. ₦120,000,000.

fields.title: Commercial Plaza in Ikeja GRA
fields.description: A fully built commercial plaza with 8 shop units on the ground floor and 4 office suites on the first floor. Located on a very busy road in Ikeja GRA. Excellent for investment.
fields.meta_description: Commercial plaza for sale in Ikeja GRA, Lagos. 8 shops + 4 offices. ₦450,000,000.

fields.title: Affordable Land in Ajah - 300sqm
fields.description: A well-located dry land in Ajah, very close to the Lekki-Epe Expressway. Survey plan available. Suitable for residential development. Good road access and developing neighborhood.
fields.meta_description: 300sqm dry land for sale in Ajah, Lagos. Survey plan available. ₦18,000,000.

fields.title: Executive Mansion in Abuja Asokoro
fields.description: A palatial 6-bedroom mansion in the exclusive Asokoro district of Abuja. Features include: cinema room, gym, swimming pool, 4 lounges, domestic quarters, large compound and exceptional finishing throughout.
fields.meta_description: Executive 6-bedroom mansion for sale in Asokoro, Abuja. ₦800,000,000.

fields.name: Adebayo Okonkwo
fields.content: Defola's Properties made my property investment journey incredibly smooth. Their team was professional, knowledgeable and always available. I bought my Lekki land through them and I couldn't be happier.

fields.name: Chidinma Eze
fields.content: I was nervous buying my first property but the team at Defola's made the process so easy. They found me the perfect 3-bedroom apartment within my budget. Highly recommended!

fields.name: Emeka Nwosu
fields.content: We purchased a commercial plaza through Defola's Properties for our business. The transaction was transparent, fast and hassle-free. Their legal support was exceptional.

fields.name: Defola Adeyemi
fields.bio: With over 15 years in Nigerian real estate, Defola leads the company with vision and integrity.

fields.name: Tunde Afolabi
fields.bio: Tunde has closed over 200 property deals and is renowned for his client-first approach.

fields.name: Amaka Obi
fields.bio: Amaka ensures every transaction is legally sound and all documentation is perfect.

fields.name: Segun Badmus
fields.bio: Segun leads all site inspections and due diligence, ensuring every listing meets our standards.
